---
title: "R Training"
author: "Andrew"
date: 2026-03-18
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}

#this creates a comment

1
3
5
typeof(8.5)
```

```{r}
a <- c(1, 2, 3)
a
c("a", "b", "c")
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
source("training_source.R")
```

```{r}
csv_path <- "../data/raw/presurvey_20260317.csv"
survey_raw <- rio::import(csv_path)
```
